headline: AI Bubble Warning: 'Lehman Bros. Moment' Coming for Tech
detail: This critic warns of severe fallout for tech, your core sector. Trading on margin means drawdowns will hit extra hard, making this a critical warning for your concentrated book.
rec: Seriously consider trimming or cutting your SOXL position given its -42.2% loss and SELL status. Also review SPAL's -35.63% loss and respect its stop at 21.38.

headline: Magnificent Seven Problem for Stock Market
detail: This headline, even if nuanced, highlights underlying issues with the dominant tech names. It reinforces the need for caution in your highly concentrated tech portfolio.
rec: No direct trade action, but reinforces the need to monitor your tech holdings closely, especially QQQ and QQQI.
